title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
